Investors are advised to avoid bottom-fishing and wait for stabilisation signals.

dailyNews.title: Iran using AI to control global narrative as regime can't win on the battlefield, former security chief warns
dailyNews.description: Former CISA director warns Iran is allegedly using AI to create false narratives about winning against the U.S., urging people to be careful about online content.

dailyNews.title: Former Utah State volleyball star says SJSU trans scandal caused injured fingers, shattered dreams
dailyNews.description: Former Utah State star athlete Kaylie Ray talks about the "helplessness" of competing against a transgender player and the fall out from forfeiting games that season.

dailyNews.title: Virginia Democrats dig in on DHS funding line despite ISIS-linked shooting at ODU, illegal immigrant murder
dailyNews.description: Virginia Democratic Sens. Mark Warner and Tim Kaine oppose DHS funding without reforms, despite a deadly shooting at Old Dominion University involving suspect with ISIS links.

dailyNews.title: Gina Gershon reveals 'creepy' encounter with man who later murdered Playboy Playmate Dorothy Stratten
dailyNews.description: Gina Gershon reveals "creepy" encounter with Paul Snider in new memoir. The actress recalls meeting Dorothy Stratten's killer weeks before the 1980 murder.

dailyNews.title: Cleanest cruise lines revealed after CDC surprise sanitation inspections
dailyNews.description: Study finds cleanest cruise ships still face viral outbreaks, as CDC data shows no link between sanitation scores and onboard illness despite inspections.

dailyNews.title: Trump compared by MS NOW contributor to a less 'serious' Hitler who's 'selling merch'
dailyNews.description: MS NOW contributor Anand Giridharadas said President Donald Trump was a less serious form Hitler because at least the Nazi leader didn't sell merchandise.

dailyNews.title: Ex-Dem senator admits to affair with former bodyguard in explosive court filing: 'Romantic and Intimate'
dailyNews.description: Sinema, the former Arizona senator, outlined details of the affair in a new court filing seeking to dismiss an 'alienation of affection' lawsuit filed by her bodyguard's estranged wife.

dailyNews.title: Nicole Kidman's absolute non-negotiable rule for on-screen kisses with co-stars
dailyNews.description: Nicole Kidman reveals her biggest dealbreaker for filming kissing scenes: bad breath. The actress shares candid thoughts on intimate scenes and co-stars.

dailyNews.title: Walker Hayes says kids had ‘front-row seat’ to struggles, including ‘alcoholic dad’
dailyNews.description: Country singer Walker Hayes opens up about his journey from working at Costco and battling alcoholism.

dailyNews.title: Joe Rogan blasts life in Hollywood for 'fake' people and 'groupthink' politics
dailyNews.description: Joe Rogan explains why he preferred being around fighters and comedians over Hollywood actors, producers and casting agents during his time in Los Angeles entertainment industry.

dailyNews.title: 'Undertone' Review: An unsettling horror film that's meant to be heard
dailyNews.description: Fox News Digital reviews A24's new horror film "Undertone" starring Nina Kiri and Adam DiMarco as two paranormal podcasters. Written and directed by Ian Tuason.

dailyNews.title: Woman's alarming cancer symptoms blamed on pregnancy for years before stage 3 diagnosis
dailyNews.description: Los Angeles mom Marisa Peters had her colorectal cancer symptoms dismissed by doctors for five years before her stage 3 diagnosis. Now, she's an early intervention advocate.

dailyNews.title: Dems continue to reject GOP efforts to fund ICE in DHS fight despite terror concerns: 'That's on them'
dailyNews.description: Democrats accuse Republicans of prolonging government shutdown over ICE funding dispute, as impasse enters second month with no clear resolution in sight.

topStories.description: Unleashing his inner hawk, Secretary of State Marco Rubio plans President Trump’s military interventions. So far, they favor regime compliance, not change.

topStories.title: Trump Administration Approves Ultra-Deepwater Oil Drilling Plan
topStories.description: The $5 billion project in the Gulf of Mexico is expected to produce up to 10 billion barrels of oil by the end of this decade. Critics say it could endanger people and marine life.

topStories.description: An investigation of the Federal Reserve was thwarted on Friday, but a department appeal could reimpose an obstacle in Kevin Warsh’s path.

topStories.description: Since Richard Grenell was appointed by President Trump, the arts center has endured waves of cancellations and departures. It will soon close for lengthy renovations.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump administration's subpoenas against Fed Chair Powell
dailyNews.description: A federal judge blocked two grand jury subpoenas against Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell on Friday. Chief Judge James Boasberg wrote that "the Government has offered no evidence whatsoever that Powell committed any crime other than displeasing the President."

dailyNews.title: U.S. strikes key Iranian oil hub
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Friday night on social media that the U.S. struck a key Iranian oil hub on Kharg Island as tensions over the global oil supply ramp up amid Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: How would escorting oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz work?
dailyNews.description: With oil markets paralyzed by the U.S.-Iran war, the Trump administration says it could escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz — a massive undertaking that experts say could already be in the preparatory stages.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. forces have destroyed the military assets of Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: In a Truth Social post, President Trump said that the U.S. forces "obliterated" Iranian military targets on Kharg Island. The president said the island's oil infrastructure was spared in the attack, but could be struck down the road.

dailyNews.title: Some Republicans warn Trump's SAVE America Act is doomed as Senate tees up a vote
dailyNews.description: Sen. Mike Lee has an online army pressuring Republicans to pass the SAVE America Act, a sweeping election bill, that President Donald Trump declared his top priority.

dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. 'obliterated' military targets on Iran's Kharg Island but didn't 'wipe out' oil infrastructure
dailyNews.description: President Trump said in a Truth Social post that he directed U.S. Central Command to execute a bombing raid that "obliterated" military targets on Kharg Island.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he thinks Putin is helping Iran
dailyNews.description: Russian leaders told President Trump they aren't sharing intelligence with Iran as it fights the U.S. and Israel, special envoy Steve Witkoff said this week.

dailyNews.title: Did tariff dividend checks just become more likely? Economists weigh in
dailyNews.description: Months after President Donald Trump suggested sending Americans a $2,000 tariff dividend check, there's a chance households could see that stimulus in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Trump can't 'drill, baby, drill' his way out of this Iran-inspired oil crisis: Experts
dailyNews.description: Oil prices have skyrocketed in the days since President Donald Trump's war on Iran began.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
